queries.query: INSERT INTO ts_header (ts_key, time_dim, unit_id, currency_id, object_id, description) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) RETURNING ts_id
SELECT ts_id, ts_key, time_dim, unit_id, currency_id, object_id, description, created_at, updated_at FROM ts_header WHERE ts_id = ?
SELECT ts_id, ts_key, time_dim, unit_id, currency_id, object_id, description, created_at, updated_at FROM ts_header WHERE ts_key = ?
SELECT ts_id, ts_key, time_dim, unit_id, currency_id, object_id, description, created_at, updated_at FROM ts_header WHERE time_dim = ?
UPDATE ts_header SET ts_key = ?, unit_id = ?, currency_id = ?, object_id = ?, description = ?, updated_at = NOW() WHERE ts_id = ?
UPDATE ts_header SET object_id = ? WHERE ts_id = ?
SELECT ts_id, ts_key, time_dim, unit_id, currency_id, object_id, description, created_at, updated_at FROM ts_header WHERE object_id = ?
